prompt: A vibrant, colorful digital painting in a lively impressionistic style with bold brush strokes and saturated colors. Two large crystal wine glasses filled with red sangria on a sunny outdoor Parisian café table. The left glass is packed with orange slices, kiwi, raspberries, strawberries, and cherries, overflowing with fresh mint on top. The right glass has similar fruits plus a scoop of pink and white ice cream or whipped cream, topped with raspberry and mint. A whole bright orange sits on the table next to scattered almonds on a white napkin with a spoon. Background shows a charming European street café with buildings, blue awnings, green trees, pink flowers, outdoor seating, and warm sunlight. Highly detailed, joyful summer atmosphere, glossy reflections on glass, rich textures.
